description: **Parse-time config loading.** Config files are now loaded at parse time (not construction time), ensuring late-written config files are honored.

**`--config` flag and `no_default_config_path` option.** `--config <path>` selects a config file explicitly; `no_default_config_path` requires explicit `--config` instead of searching the default path.

**Hard-error config loading and config conflict mode.** Malformed TOML and JSON config files produce hard errors with line/column position information. `config_conflict_mode="error"` (an `App` argument) makes a value set both in the config file and on the CLI (or env) a hard error instead of silently letting the CLI win; the default stays `cli-wins`.
**`--hermetic` flag.** Ignores env vars and config, using only CLI flags and defaults. Mutually exclusive with `--config` and config subcommands.
**`ctx.Source` provenance API.** `ctx.source(flag)` returns the origin of each flag value: `cli`, `env`, `config`, `default`, or `implied`.
**Reserved global flag names enforced.** Global flags named `help`, `version`, `dump-schema`, `config`, `hermetic`, or `mcp` are now rejected at registration time.
